// ============================================================
// CORVID 2.0 | managers/database/target-db
// Target record schema and operations.
// Every machine encountered  -  whether exploited or discovered.
//
// Schema:
//   id          string    -  auto-generated e.g. "t_001"
//   public_ip   string    -  public IP address
//   lan_ip      string    -  LAN IP address
//   router_ip   string    -  router public IP
//   hostname    string    -  machine name if known
//   org_id      string    -  linked organisation ID
//   privilege   string    -  highest privilege achieved
//   status      string    -  unknown|scanned|exploited|owned|bounce
//   ports       list      -  port records (see below)
//   exploit_db  map       -  lib_key -> list of exploit records
//   notes       string    -  freeform notes
//   ssh_default bool      -  true if SSH was open natively (not installed by us)
//
// Port record:
//   port       number
//   service    string
//   version    string
//   forwarded  bool
//   exploited  bool
//
// Exploit record:
//   address    string    -  memory address
//   exploit    string    -  overflow value
//   rtype      string    -  Shell|Computer|File|Failed
//   privilege  string    -  root|user|guest|unknown
// ============================================================

TARGET_STATUS = {}
TARGET_STATUS.UNKNOWN   = "unknown"
TARGET_STATUS.SCANNED   = "scanned"
TARGET_STATUS.EXPLOITED = "exploited"
TARGET_STATUS.OWNED     = "owned"
TARGET_STATUS.BOUNCE    = "bounce"

TargetDb = {}
TargetDb.db = null

TargetDb.findByPublicIp = function(ip)
    // Full scan by public_ip to return ALL records for this IP
    // (ipIndex only holds one entry per IP so can't use it for multi-record networks)
    matchIp = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("public_ip") and record.public_ip == ip
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchIp)
end function

TargetDb.findByLanIp = function(ip)
    matchIp = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("lan_ip") and record.lan_ip == ip
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchIp)
end function

TargetDb.findByStatus = function(status)
    matchStatus = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("status") and record.status == status
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchStatus)
end function

TargetDb.findByOrg = function(orgId)
    matchOrg = function(record)
        return record.hasIndex("org_id") and record.org_id == orgId
    end function
    return self.db.query(@matchOrg)
end function

TargetDb.findBounces = function()
    return self.findByStatus(TARGET_STATUS.BOUNCE)
end function

TargetDb.getExploits = function(id, libKey)
    record = self.db.get(id)
    if record isa Error then
        return record
    end if
    if not record.hasIndex("exploit_db") then
        return []
    end if
    if not record.exploit_db.hasIndex(libKey) then
        return []
    end if
    return record.exploit_db[libKey]
end function

TargetDb.upsert = function(data)
    // Natural key: public_ip + lan_ip
    if not data.hasIndex("public_ip") then
        return Error.New("Target record requires public_ip", "VALIDATION_ERROR")
    end if

    lanIp = ""
    if data.hasIndex("lan_ip") then
        lanIp = data.lan_ip
    end if

    matchExisting = function(record)
        if record.public_ip != data.public_ip then
            return false
        end if
        // Only enforce lan_ip match if BOTH have a lan_ip set
        if lanIp.len > 0 and record.hasIndex("lan_ip") and record.lan_ip.len > 0 and record.lan_ip != lanIp then
            return false
        end if
        return true
    end function

    existing = self.db.query(@matchExisting)
    if existing.len > 0 then
        record = existing[0]
        id     = record.id
        // Merge ports  -  avoid duplicates by port number
        if data.hasIndex("ports") then
            for newPort in data.ports
                found = false
                if record.ports.len > 0 then
                    for i in range(0, record.ports.len - 1)
                        if record.ports[i].port == newPort.port then
                            record.ports[i] = newPort
                            found = true
                        end if
                    end for
                end if
                if not found then
                    record.ports.push(newPort)
                end if
            end for
        end if
        // Update scalar fields
        if data.hasIndex("hostname")  and data.hostname.len  > 0 then
            record.hostname  = data.hostname
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("org_id")    and data.org_id.len    > 0 then
            record.org_id    = data.org_id
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("router_ip") and data.router_ip.len > 0 then
            record.router_ip = data.router_ip
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("notes")     and data.notes.len     > 0 then
            if record.notes.len > 0 then
                record.notes = record.notes + char(10) + data.notes
            else
                record.notes = data.notes
            end if
        end if
        // Status  -  only upgrade, never downgrade
        statusOrder = [TARGET_STATUS.UNKNOWN, TARGET_STATUS.SCANNED, TARGET_STATUS.EXPLOITED, TARGET_STATUS.OWNED, TARGET_STATUS.BOUNCE]
        if data.hasIndex("status") then
            currentIdx = statusOrder.indexOf(record.status)
            newIdx     = statusOrder.indexOf(data.status)
            if newIdx == null then
                newIdx = 0
            end if
            if currentIdx == null then
                currentIdx = 0
            end if
            if newIdx > currentIdx then
                record.status = data.status
            end if
        end if
        // Privilege  -  only upgrade
        privOrder = ["unknown", "guest", "user", "root"]
        if data.hasIndex("privilege") then
            currentPrivIdx = privOrder.indexOf(record.privilege)
            newPrivIdx     = privOrder.indexOf(data.privilege)
            if newPrivIdx == null then
                newPrivIdx = 0
            end if
            if currentPrivIdx == null then
                currentPrivIdx = 0
            end if
            if newPrivIdx > currentPrivIdx then
                record.privilege = data.privilege
            end if
        end if
        // Exploit DB  -  merge by lib key
        if data.hasIndex("exploit_db") then
            if not record.hasIndex("exploit_db") then
                record.exploit_db = {}
            end if
            for kv in data.exploit_db
                record.exploit_db[kv.key] = kv.value
            end for
        end if
        // ssh_default  -  once true, stays true
        if data.hasIndex("ssh_default") and data.ssh_default then
            record.ssh_default = true
        end if
        self.db.set(id, record)
        return id
    else
        id = self.db.nextId("t")
        record = {}
        record.id          = id
        record.public_ip   = data.public_ip
        record.lan_ip      = ""
        record.router_ip   = ""
        record.hostname    = ""
        record.org_id      = ""
        record.privilege   = "unknown"
        record.status      = TARGET_STATUS.UNKNOWN
        record.ports       = []
        record.exploit_db  = {}
        record.notes       = ""
        record.ssh_default = false
        if data.hasIndex("lan_ip")      then
            record.lan_ip      = data.lan_ip
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("router_ip")   then
            record.router_ip   = data.router_ip
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("hostname")    then
            record.hostname     = data.hostname
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("org_id")      then
            record.org_id      = data.org_id
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("privilege")   then
            record.privilege    = data.privilege
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("status")      then
            record.status       = data.status
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("ports")       then
            record.ports        = data.ports
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("exploit_db")  then
            record.exploit_db   = data.exploit_db
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("notes")       then
            record.notes        = data.notes
        end if
        if data.hasIndex("ssh_default") then
            record.ssh_default  = data.ssh_default
        end if
        self.db.set(id, record)
        return id
    end if
end function

TargetDb.storeExploits = function(targetId, libKey, exploits)
    // Store tested exploit results against a target by library key
    record = self.db.get(targetId)
    if record isa Error then
        return record
    end if
    if not record.hasIndex("exploit_db") then
        record.exploit_db = {}
    end if
    record.exploit_db[libKey] = exploits
    self.db.set(targetId, record)
end function

TargetDb.setStatus = function(targetId, status)
    record = self.db.get(targetId)
    if record isa Error then
        return record
    end if
    record.status = status
    self.db.set(targetId, record)
end function

TargetDb.addNote = function(id, note)
    record = self.db.get(id)
    if record isa Error then
        return record
    end if
    if record.notes.len > 0 then
        record.notes = record.notes + char(10) + note
    else
        record.notes = note
    end if
    self.db.set(id, record)
end function

TargetDb.get = function(id)
    return self.db.get(id)
end function

TargetDb.all = function()
    return self.db.all()
end function

TargetDb.New = function(db)
    result    = new TargetDb
    result.db = db
    return result
end function
